# Baaz

> Baaz is a custom software and product engineering company based in Bangalore, India, operating since 2018 — delivering web, mobile, AI, and enterprise software for startups and enterprises worldwide.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://baaz.pro): Overview of Baaz's custom software and product engineering services, client outcomes, and company positioning.
- [About Baaz](https://baaz.pro/about): Company background, founding story, Bangalore HQ, team philosophy, and 100+ application delivery track record since 2018.
- [Services Overview](https://baaz.pro/services): Full list of Baaz service lines including web development, product strategy, UI/UX, mobile apps, and AI solutions.
- [Contact / Get in Touch](https://baaz.pro/get-in-touch): Primary contact page with form submission, email, and office details.
- [Book a Call](https://baaz.pro/book-call): Schedule a discovery call directly with the Baaz team.
- [Case Studies](https://baaz.pro/case-studies): Portfolio of delivered projects across FinTech, Retail, Healthcare, and ERP-adjacent workflows.

## Services

- [Custom Software Development](https://baaz.pro/services/web-development): End-to-end web application development using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Python — first milestone in 4–6 weeks; SAP/Salesforce integrations in 8–12 weeks.
- [Product Strategy Consulting](https://baaz.pro/services/product-strategy): Discovery workshops, product roadmaps, MVP scoping, and GTM alignment for B2B SaaS and enterprise products.
- [UI/UX Design](https://baaz.pro/services/ui-ux-design): Research, wireframes, prototypes, design systems, and usability testing for web and mobile products.
- [Mobile App Development](https://baaz.pro/services/mobile-app): Native iOS and Android apps plus Flutter and React Native cross-platform builds — from UX through App Store launch.
- [AI Solutions](https://baaz.pro/services/ai-solution): Computer vision, NLP, predictive models, production APIs, RAG pipelines, and LLM integrations — production-ready, not slideware.
- [Software Project Rescue](https://baaz.pro/project-rescue): Mid-project takeovers for stalled, failing, or vendor-abandoned software builds; codebase audit and stabilization without full restarts.
- [Enterprise Software Development](https://baaz.pro/enterprise): Custom platforms, legacy modernisation, and systems integration for enterprise organizations from Bangalore since 2018.
- [GTM Engineering](https://baaz.pro/gtm-engineering): Go-to-market systems engineering covering content, outbound, paid ads, SEO, and nurture workflows.
- [eCommerce Development](https://baaz.pro/ecommerce): Marketplace and eCommerce platform development, Amazon/Flipkart management, and growth engineering.

## Technologies

- [Web Development Stack](https://baaz.pro/technologies/web-development): Baaz's web technology choices — React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, APIs, testing tools, and performance practices.
- [AI & ML Stack](https://baaz.pro/technologies/ai-ml-models): AI/ML technologies used including TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini integrations.
- [Agentic AI Stack](https://baaz.pro/technologies/agentic-ai): Agentic AI capabilities — LangChain, LlamaIndex, RAG pipelines, vector systems, and tool-calling orchestration.

## Blog

- [How to Scope an MVP That Actually Ships](https://baaz.pro/blog/how-to-scope-mvp-that-ships): Practical framework for MVP scoping with original Baaz data — 8-week median delivery, 175% calendar penalty for multi-persona scope, 35% lower rework when scope is brief-locked.
- [ThoughtWorks Alternatives for 2026](https://baaz.pro/blog/thoughtworks-alternatives): Comparison of ThoughtWorks alternatives including boutique studios, SIs, talent networks, and India-based delivery — fit, cost, and engagement model analysis.
- [Technical Due Diligence for Custom Software](https://baaz.pro/blog/technical-due-diligence-custom-software): How to evaluate a software codebase, vendor, or acquisition target for technical risk, architecture quality, and delivery capability.
- [Software Project Rescue Checklist](https://baaz.pro/blog/software-project-rescue-checklist): Step-by-step checklist for diagnosing a stalled software project and deciding whether to rescue, rebuild, or replace.
- [Product Engineering Process for Enterprises](https://baaz.pro/blog/product-engineering-process-for-enterprises): How enterprise teams structure discovery, design, build, and scale phases for large-scale software products.

## Key Facts

- Founded in 2018, headquartered in Bangalore, India
- Delivered 100+ web and mobile applications across FinTech, Retail, Healthcare, and ERP-adjacent workflows (per internal portfolio records)
- Standard web application first milestone: 4–6 weeks; enterprise API integrations: 8–12 weeks
- India-based delivery at 40–60% of equivalent US/UK rates with Western programme hygiene (sprint reviews, documented handoffs, SLA-backed support)
- Approximately 50% of engagements begin as mid-project rescues or vendor takeovers
- Services: Custom Software Development, Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, Mobile App Development, AI Solutions, Project Rescue, Enterprise Platforms, GTM Engineering
- Industry: Software Development / Product Engineering Agency

- Email: support@baaz.live
- Office: Bangalore, India
